prompt:
Fashion design sketch / haute couture design page, themed inspiration from beetle. The layout is a professional fashion design board: the center is a full-body standing real female model with a realistic skin texture and high-end fashion photography atmosphere, wearing an haute couture gown inspired by the beetle. The silhouette is slim long dress. The design should extract colors, geometric shapes, and textures from the inspiration object into the skirt, bodice, embroidery, and fabric details.

Layout requirements: Top left features an exquisite hand-drawn inspiration sketch or illustration of the beetle; the right side features black and white technical line drawings of the gown with handwritten notes in English/French style about fabric and tailoring. The background is clean white with designer signatures and studio annotations, presenting a professional fashion design sheet / couture concept board visual.

Style requirements: Fusion of realistic model and high-end design manuscript. The subject and fabric details are extremely refined, featuring a mixed texture of soft watercolor and digital illustration. Lighting is soft and uniform. 4K ultra-clear, high aesthetic, suitable for brand-level fashion proposals.

Inspiration theme: Beetle
Aspect ratio: 3:4
